phases.name: Protocol Standard
phases.description: Define the KirinDNS Resolution Protocol (ADRP) specification

phases.name: Library Implementations
phases.description: Implement ADRP client libraries in Python, JavaScript, Go, and Rust

phases.name: Browser Extension
phases.description: Build a browser extension that intercepts requests and resolves ports via ADRP

phases.name: Chromium Browser Fork
phases.description: Fork Chromium and patch the networking layer to support native ADRP resolution

phases.name: Adoption and RFC
phases.description: Draft RFC submission, publish demo sites, and drive community adoption

phases.name: Open Source Release
phases.description: Finalize project for public release: tests, CI/CD, documentation

phases.name: KirinNet Platform
phases.description: Design KirinNet decentralized content platform architecture and API contract

phases.name: KirinNet Implementation
phases.description: Implement KirinNet backend (Express) and frontend (Next.js) scaffolding with mock KirinDNS
